opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These crusty yellow sores appeared out of nowhere yesterday, and they are spreading across my face so incredibly fast.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The sores are weeping and spreading really quickly across my face and I'm scared of passing it to my family — I want to know what it is and what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 2 days ago it started as a couple of tiny blisters around my nostrils, right after I'd been blowing my nose a lot with a cold
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 48 hours, but it really took off in the last 24
symptom_narrative.character: small blisters that popped really easily and then turned into thick, stuck-on yellow-golden crusts sitting on top of red skin
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: not painful at all really, just a bit itchy and it looks awful and keeps spreading
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: started around my nose, now it's on my top lip and my right cheek
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it's been getting worse and spreading each day, no let-up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing seems to help — a cream I tried made it worse if anything
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps spreading on its own, and I think scratching it makes new spots appear
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mild itch around the sores; no real pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm managing everything day to day fine, I just feel self-conscious and worried about the spread

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an over-the-counter hydrocortisone cream I've been dabbing on the sores for the last day or so

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with family; shares a bathroom, towels and linen with them; recently had a mild head cold with a runny nose

objective_data_offered.value: 37.2 C on my thermometer at home this morning — no fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single self-taken reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: on video: several coalescing sores with thick, stuck-on honey/golden-coloured crusts over bright red skin, around the nostrils, upper lip and right cheek; some have popped and are weeping; no obvious deep ulcers or black tissue
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view, lighting and resolution limited

objective_data_offered.value: the sores don't hurt when I touch them, and my mouth and gums look normal to me
